sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63093" key="ligu/krotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐγῠ´-κροτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loud-rattling</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λιγυρώτατον</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. foreg.</sense> </entryFree>
